back office attach new sct document

client service back office receives the request
client service back office retrieves the sct file
client service back office forwards the sct warrant possession to queensland police
back office stores the sct physical file
back office awaits a police report
back office  retrieves the respective sct file and back office attaches the new sct document

random_sequences_best_pair.task_a: back office stores the sct physical file

user_text:
The process begins when a party sends a request for a warrant possession. This request is received by the Client Service Back Office. Once the request is in their hands, the Client Service Back Office retrieves the SCT file related to the request. After obtaining the file, they forward the SCT Warrant Possession to the Queensland Police for further action.

Following this, the Back Office stores the physical SCT file securely. They then enter a waiting period, during which they anticipate receiving a report from the Police. Once the Police report is received, the Back Office retrieves the respective SCT file again to update it.

The next step involves the Back Office attaching the new SCT document, which includes the information from the Police report, to the existing file. After this update, the Back Office stores the expanded SCT physical file, ensuring all documents are kept together. This marks the end of the process.
output_text:
The process begins when a party sends a request for a warrant possession. This request is received by the Client Service Back Office. Once the request is received, the Client Service Back Office retrieves the SCT file related to the request. After retrieving the file, the Client Service Back Office forwards the SCT Warrant Possession to the Queensland Police for further action.

Following this, the Back Office stores the physical SCT file securely. The process then involves a waiting period where the Back Office awaits a report from the Police. Once the Police report is received, the Back Office retrieves the respective SCT file again. At this point, the Back Office attaches the new SCT document to the file.

Finally, the Back Office stores the expanded SCT physical file, which now includes the new document. This marks the end of the process.
